productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Love & Luck Women Mermaid Fragrance Gift Set
description: It's not just about looking good, but smelling good too. And that's something ed hardy believes in completely. With the celebration season here, look no further for gifts. This Love and Luck Mermaid gift set from ed hardy makes for a perfect medium to express your love for that beautiful woman in your life. This set contains notes of bergamot, blood orange, red sake accord, black current, pink peppercorn, nectarine, jasmine, forbidden plum, sensual musk, cedarwood, sandalwood and patchouli.Bathe in fragrant luxury with the bath and shower gel that comes in a 90 ml tubeRevel in that smooth and supple skin with the body lotion that comes in a 90 ml tubeEu De Perfume spray in two bottles of 7.5 ml and 100 ml
